'''鈭歠-ng-t''' ('''fangata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yark|yark]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yark|yark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-ng-t
|-
! Lemma
| fangata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fangatithi|fangatithi]] || [[word:fangatiji|fangatiji]] || [[word:fangatishi|fangatishi]] || [[word:fangati|fangati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fangatuthuth|fangatuthuth]] || [[word:fangatujuj|fangatujuj]] || [[word:fangatushush|fangatushush]] || [[word:fangat|fangat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fangatuthu|fangatuthu]] || [[word:fangatuju|fangatuju]] || [[word:fangatushu|fangatushu]] || [[word:fangatu|fangatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fangatufuth|fangatufuth]] || [[word:fangatufuj|fangatufuj]] || [[word:fangatufush|fangatufush]] || [[word:fangatuf|fangatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fangatethe|fangatethe]] || [[word:fangateje|fangateje]] || [[word:fangateshe|fangateshe]] || [[word:fangate|fangate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fangatothoth|fangatothoth]] || [[word:fangatojoj|fangatojoj]] || [[word:fangatoshosh|fangatoshosh]] || [[word:fangat|fangat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fangatotho|fangatotho]] || [[word:fangatojo|fangatojo]] || [[word:fangatosho|fangatosho]] || [[word:fangato|fangato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fangatofoth|fangatofoth]] || [[word:fangatofoj|fangatofoj]] || [[word:fangatofosh|fangatofosh]] || [[word:fangatof|fangatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fangat忙th忙|fangat忙th忙]] || [[word:fangat忙j忙|fangat忙j忙]] || [[word:fangat忙sh忙|fangat忙sh忙]] || [[word:fangat忙|fangat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fangatathath|fangatathath]] || [[word:fangatajaj|fangatajaj]] || [[word:fangatashash|fangatashash]] || [[word:fangat|fangat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fangatatha|fangatatha]] || [[word:fangataja|fangataja]] || [[word:fangatasha|fangatasha]] || [[word:fangata|fangata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fangatafath|fangatafath]] || [[word:fangatafaj|fangatafaj]] || [[word:fangatafash|fangatafash]] || [[word:fangataf|fangataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fangatasha|fangatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofangatasha|gofangatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifangatasha|gokifangatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fangatn眉sha|fangatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofangatnkn眉sha|gofangatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifangatn眉sha|gokifangatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fangatsh毛sha|fangatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofangatnksh毛sha|gofangatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifangatsh毛sha|gokifangatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fangatrosha|fangatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofangatnkrosha|gofangatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifangatrosha|gokifangatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fangatmusha|fangatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofangatnkmusha|gofangatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifangatmusha|gokifangatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fangatsherasha|fangatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofangatnksherasha|gofangatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifangatsherasha|gokifangatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fangatngasha|fangatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofangatnkngasha|gofangatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifangatngasha|gokifangatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fangatyasha|fangatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofangatnkyasha|gofangatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifangatyasha|gokifangatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fangatyamasha|fangatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofangatnkyamasha|gofangatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifangatyamasha|gokifangatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fangatn眉sh毛sha|fangatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofangatnkn眉sh毛sha|gofangatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifangatn眉sh毛sha|gokifangatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fangatn眉rosha|fangatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofangatnkn眉rosha|gofangatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifangatn眉rosha|gokifangatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fangatn眉musha|fangatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofangatnkn眉musha|gofangatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifangatn眉musha|gokifangatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fangatsh毛n眉sha|fangatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofangatnksh毛n眉sha|gofangatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifangatsh毛n眉sha|gokifangatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fangatsh毛rosha|fangatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofangatnksh毛rosha|gofangatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifangatsh毛rosha|gokifangatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fangatsh毛musha|fangatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofangatnksh毛musha|gofangatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifangatsh毛musha|gokifangatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fangatron眉sha|fangatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofangatnkron眉sha|gofangatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifangatron眉sha|gokifangatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fangatrosh毛sha|fangatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofangatnkrosh毛sha|gofangatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifangatrosh毛sha|gokifangatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fangatromusha|fangatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofangatnkromusha|gofangatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifangatromusha|gokifangatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fangatmun眉sha|fangatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofangatnkmun眉sha|gofangatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifangatmun眉sha|gokifangatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fangatmush毛sha|fangatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofangatnkmush毛sha|gofangatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifangatmush毛sha|gokifangatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fangatmurosha|fangatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofangatnkmurosha|gofangatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifangatmurosha|gokifangatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fangat|fangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:f忙ng忙t|f忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofangat|hofangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hof忙ng忙t|hof忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofangat|hohofangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohof忙ng忙t|hohof忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉fangat|n眉fangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉f忙ng忙t|n眉f忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉fangat|n眉n眉fangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉f忙ng忙t|n眉n眉f忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂fangat|n茂fangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂f忙ng忙t|n茂f忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂fangat|n茂n茂fangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂f忙ng忙t|n茂n茂f忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufangat|lufangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luf忙ng忙t|luf忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufangat|lulufangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluf忙ng忙t|luluf忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifangat|lifangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lif忙ng忙t|lif忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifangat|lilifangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilif忙ng忙t|lilif忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofangat|kofangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kof忙ng忙t|kof忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofangat|kokofangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokof忙ng忙t|kokof忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefangat|kefangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kef忙ng忙t|kef忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefangat|kekefangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekef忙ng忙t|kekef忙ng忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
